## Type of Change

<!-- Put an `x` in all the boxes that apply -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/formatting changes
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Build/CI configuration change
- [ ] 🧹 Chore (other changes that don't modify src or test files)

## Checklist

<!-- Put an `x` in all the boxes that apply -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (`just lint`)
- [ ] I have run TypeScript checks (`just check`)
- [ ] I have checked for unused exports/dependencies (`just knip`)
- [ ] I have updated translations if needed (`just i18n-check`)
- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-messages) format
- [ ] My branch name follows the [Branch Naming](CONTRIBUTING.md#branch-naming) convention
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
